post.summary: Create a maintenance work order for a machine fault
post.description: Creates a maintenance work order for a detected equipment fault, tracks the fault occurrence count for the machine, and returns the work order details.

machine_id.description: The unique identifier of the machine, e.g. Line3-Motor7

fault_type.description: The type of fault detected, e.g. 'high vibration' or 'overheating'

severity.description: The severity level of the fault as stated in the SOP, e.g. HIGH or MEDIUM

200.description: Work order created successfully, including occurrence count and status

get.summary: Check how many times a fault has occurred for a machine
get.description: Retrieves the historical occurrence count of a specific fault type for a given machine, used to decide whether the issue is recurring and should be escalated.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the machine, e.g. Line3-Motor7

parameters.name: fault_type
parameters.description: The type of fault to check history for, e.g. 'high vibration' or 'overheating'

200.description: The occurrence count for the specified machine and fault type

schema.description: Fault history details including occurrence count
